ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "year" TEXT /* Classification year of the athlete (e.g., FR-1, SR-4) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who is responsible for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's ID */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Performance mark in meters */,
  "english_mark" TEXT /* Performance mark in English units (feet and inches) */,
  "wind" REAL /* Wind speed during the performance */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the performance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Long Jump) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Field, Track) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the event takes place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event ID */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's ID */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance ID */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the athlete in the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Classification year of the athlete (e.g., FR-1, SR-4)
Reference to the team the athlete belongs to
Date of birth of the athlete
Height of the athlete in meters

Type of the event (e.g., Field, Track)
